text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's because of the show I was watching...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Aha, ha, hahaha! I can't! Every time I think about
it, I just start laughing!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That episode was way more hilarious than usual
too! It's keeping me up at night because I can't
stop laughing about it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew... The masters of comedy... are a dangerous
bunch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While it's good she enjoyed her day off, her lack
of sleep proves to be a problem...
